title: Don't Start ANY Claude Code Project Until You Watch This
summary: Austin Marchese outlines 3 rules for successfully building projects with Claude Code and presents 6 moves for leading an AI team, drawn from his experience scaling a $25M+ startup. The content includes a 4-question test framework to evaluate projects before starting.
